emergency_definition: Complete HVAC failure in a medical facility or server room
Building temperature is unsafe for occupants (below 60°F or above 90°F)

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Leave a voicemail at dispatch and send a notification

call_transfer_rules.if_no_answer: Collect caller information and call back within 1 business hour

after_hours_flow_summary: Call emergency dispatch or senior tech on-call
office_hours_flow_summary: Transfer to main office, collect information if busy or no answer
notes: Nordic HVAC Solutions requires initial triage before routing emergency calls
